title: Insert Item on Groups

posts.author: victoriaw (Victoria Weible)
posts.cookedHtml:
This seems small but it REALLY would help if this change was available. I use alphabetized lists a lot in monday, and it’s really difficult to add items when you have to scroll to the bottom of the group and the items you’re reviewing fall out of view. It would be great if the “add item” line could be dragged to different areas of the group, OR to have an option menu function on items that would allow you to add an item below or above a row (similar to a normal spreadsheet function).

It would be make updating large boards way faster and efficient rather than having to re-sort items in order to get items to fall into view of the “add item” line at the bottom of a group or just endlessly scrolling back and forth up and down large groups.
